commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Crabbox wrapper guard that rejects raw Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_...` reuse when the matching Crabbox-owned SSH key is missing, while preserving slug reuse and covered owned-key reuse.

PR surface: Tests +83, Other +51. Total +134 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main accepts `run --provider blacksmith-testbox --id tbx_...` without checking the Crabbox key path before delegating to Crabbox, while Crabbox later runs Blacksmith with that key path. I did not run the live Blacksmith path in this read-only review.
